frames.caption: Host stands at the counter next to a finished plate of shrimp pasta.
An ingredient card is displayed over the intro shot.
frames.on_screen_text: 12 oz linguine | 1 lb large shrimp | 4 tbsp butter | 5 cloves garlic | 1/2 cup dry white wine | 1 lemon | 1/2 cup parmesan | 1/4 cup parsley | 1/2 tsp red pepper flakes | salt & pepper

frames.caption: Shrimp are patted dry on paper towels and sprinkled with salt and pepper.
Butter melts in a large stainless skillet; minced garlic is added.
Shrimp sizzle in the skillet, turning pink and opaque.
White wine and lemon juice are poured in to deglaze the pan.
Cooked linguine is tossed into the skillet with a ladle of pasta water.
Finished pasta is garnished with parsley, parmesan, and red pepper flakes.
